title: 毎日王冠の後に・溶け落ちた翼

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! They can't keep up! No one can catch up to
her!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa put up a brave fight against
Silence Suzuka, but she just couldn't pull it off!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa runs with all her might. However,
the Otherworldly Front-Runner holds on to the
lead.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: My arms... My legs... I can't breathe... Wheeze!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: This is... I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thunk!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El? El!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Call an ambulance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wee woo wee woo...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A complete examination reveals no serious
injuries. Still...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer... No more...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I did my best... I used everything I had in me to
beat Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But even with all my strength and all the effort I
put in training with you, it wasn't good enough.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But now I'm... in pieces... A condor with broken
wings.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If someone even stronger than Suzuka shows up
at the Japan Cup, then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her shoulders slump with disappointment. It
seems like her willpower has reached its limit.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I... have to face the facts...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm not... the world's strongest racer...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This race showed me that... I still have a long way
ahead of me...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I can't do the Japan Cup... Not like this...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I just can't.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I concede to El Condor Pasa's disappointment. It
looks like we're going back to the drawing board
for this year's plan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her dream of taking on the Japan Cup in her
classic year—once a lofty ambition—has come
crashing down.
